subcodes.first_line: O my God! Thou knowest that this Thy servant's heart doth overflow with love for Thy loved ones, and his eyes are turned toward the direction [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: و انت تعلم یا الهی بان قلب عبدک هذا طافح بحب احبائک و عیناه متوجهتان الی شطر
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @soul; spirit after death, @prayer for forgiveness, @love of God
